svg.text:
┌───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐ │ GENERATIVE MODEL APPLICATIONS │ └───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
• Text-to-Image: DALL-E, Stable Diffusion, Midjourney • Image Editing: Inpainting, outpainting, style transfer • Super Resolution: ESRGAN, Real-ESRGAN • Face Generation: StyleGAN, This Person Does Not Exist • Data Augmentation: Generate training samples • Image Restoration: Denoising, deblurring • Video Generation: Make-A-Video, Runway Gen-2
